channel.title: Tony's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Java on Tony's Portfolio

item.title: BudgetFixture
item.description: A Proof of Concept AutoFixture Clone in java.
item.summary: BudgetFixture BudgetFixture is a very minimal (budget one could say), proof of concept - clone of the AutoFixture package in Java. My repository can be found here. What is AutoFixture AutoFixture is a very handy .NET library that is “designed to minimize the ‘Arrange’ phase of your unit tests in order to maximize maintainability. Its primary goal is to allow developers to focus on what is being tested rather than how to setup the test scenario, by making it easier to create object graphs containing test data.
